source.notes: Optimus demo  - 2026_06_16 12_28 EDT - Notes by Gemini.docx

call_summary: Max Riemer gave two Transportation One strategic-enterprise reps (Roshan Thakker and Alex Schnitzer) a live demo of Optimus, positioning it as a 'ZoomInfo for freight' built on real transaction data (BOLs, PODs, invoices) rather than scraped data, with lane- and trading-partner-level intent for more specific outreach. Alex probed hard on contact and mobile-number quality and requested TMS data plus better cross-vendor search, while Roshan came in cold, warmed up over the call, and tied the trading-partner feature to their own target accounts. The call closed with a 30-credit trial set up and open feature-feedback requests, but no dated follow-up was booked.

delivery_engagement.explanation: Max was conversational and responsive, building genuine rapport and reacting to buyers' points in the moment rather than reciting a script; his pitch variation (8.38 st) is highly expressive and his warmth ran above his own 59-call baseline (valence z +0.4), supporting an engaged read despite candidly admitting he didn't know the mobile-number coverage figure.

evidence.quote: Did you get logistics right after?
You'd be surprised how many sales teams and brokerages don't answer the cell the phone.

value_prop_clarity.explanation: A neutral listener could restate the pitch in one sentence: transaction-sourced freight data lets reps reference a shipper's specific lanes and contracted backhauls instead of the generic 'we have trucks in your lane' script — and Alex echoed it back as 'a granular layer of intent data,' confirming clarity.

evidence.quote: a zoom info centric to the logistics or freight space
you mention a specific lane that they run and that you have a contracted lane that could work as a back haul

relevance.explanation: The demo ran on generic examples anchored to Max's own city (Dallas–Chattanooga, Miller Industries, Coca-Cola) and never used Transportation One's actual lanes or book; when Roshan named their real accounts, Max acknowledged it but didn't pivot to search them live.

evidence.quote: if I search Dallas, we'll do a 25 mile radius to Chattanooga
right now we're working on a lot of target stuff, Armada like our customers that we're working with

discovery_progression.explanation: Most of Max's questions were rapport or logistics rather than discovery of pain, current tools, deal size, or decision process, and the call ended with an open-ended 'email me' instead of a dated follow-up — a 30-credit trial was handed off with no scheduled review.

evidence.quote: So you you full outbound sales guy?
Any questions that pop up during, just shoot me an email, shoot me a text, give me a call, whatever.

Max Riemer.coaching_action: Before the call ends, book a specific dated follow-up to review trial results together — don't leave the next step as an open-ended 'email me whenever.'

signals.signal: Probed the platform hard on his own critical evaluation criterion (mobile-number coverage), signaling both influence and serious evaluation
signals.quote: I'm pushing for the one that's got the most mobile numbers

signals.signal: Explicit positive endorsement of the product and its data
signals.quote: this product looks phenomenal. I can already tell there's some incredibly useful information

signals.signal: Forward-looking feature request (TMS data), showing he's already imagining operational use
signals.quote: TMS's, is there anything in here that shows um a particular TMS um or manage trans service that a shipper uses?

signals.signal: Own-words commitment to evaluate the trial
signals.quote: I'm excited to look at this and see the value

signals.signal: Came in cold with low understanding but converted over the call
signals.quote: I had no idea what I was really looking at, but now it all makes sense

signals.signal: Own-words intent to test after the value clicked
signals.quote: now I can see the the overall what it's trying to do and I'm I'm excited to test it

signals.signal: Connected the tool to their real book of accounts, though at a surface level and with fewer, more basic questions than Alex
signals.quote: actually name dropping these customers and leads leads will definitely help
